rationale: Educ. Code §51.805 governs university admissions criteria and has no relation to property tax homestead exemptions under Tax Code §11.13(b). No conflict exists.
quote: A graduating student who does not qualify for admission under Section 51.803 or 51.804 may apply to any general academic teaching institution
_note: Rule text concerns higher education admissions; proposed change concerns property tax exemptions. No overlap.
